parameters.name: code_challenge_method
parameters.description: The only valid PKCE code challenge method is `"S256"`. Required when specifying a `code_challenge`.

parameters.name: code_challenge
parameters.description: Code challenge derived from the code verifier used for the PKCE flow.

parameters.name: domain_hint
parameters.description: A domain hint for SSO connection lookup.

parameters.name: connection_id
parameters.description: The ID of an SSO connection to use for authentication.

parameters.name: provider_query_params
parameters.description: Key/value pairs of query parameters to pass to the OAuth provider.

parameters.name: provider_scopes
parameters.description: Additional OAuth scopes to request from the identity provider.

parameters.name: invitation_token
parameters.description: A token representing a user invitation to redeem during authentication.

parameters.name: screen_hint
parameters.description: Used to specify which screen to display when the provider is `authkit`.

parameters.name: login_hint
parameters.description: A hint to the authorization server about the login identifier the user might use.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The OAuth provider to authenticate with (e.g., GoogleOAuth, MicrosoftOAuth, GitHubOAuth).

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Controls the authentication flow behavior for the user.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: An opaque value used to maintain state between the request and the callback.

parameters.name: organization_id
parameters.description: The ID of the organization to authenticate the user against.

parameters.name: response_type
parameters.description: The response type of the application.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: The callback URI where the authorization code will be sent after authentication.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the WorkOS environment client.
